stemHtml: Where and how can you find clear ice?

options.a: CB with supercooled water droplets that when they hit the airframe release latent heat and spread out.
options.b: CU with supercooled water droplets that when they hit the airframe, they freeze immediately.
options.c: In altostratus clouds, supercooled water drops with a temperature below 15° on impact.
options.d: An impact speed onto the aerofoil above 250 kt, in cumuliform cloud tops, in the upper air.
